LightningComponentBundle.description: Scores an Agentforce voice-call transcript against a prompt template rubric and the agent's topics, instructions, and actions.

property.name: cardTitle
property.label: Card Title
property.description: Header text shown at the top of the card.

property.name: transcript
property.label: Transcript Text
property.description: Bind to a field that contains the transcript (e.g. {!Record.TranscriptContent}).

property.name: promptTemplateApiName
property.label: Prompt Template API Name
property.description: DeveloperName of the Prompt Template that contains the scoring rubric.

property.name: agentApiName
property.label: Agent (BotDefinition) API Name
property.description: DeveloperName of the Agentforce agent being evaluated.

property.name: evaluatorFlowApiName
property.label: Evaluator Flow API Name
property.description: Autolaunched Flow that invokes the Prompt Template and returns a JSON scorecard.

property.name: autoEvaluate
property.label: Auto-evaluate on load
property.description: If checked, runs the evaluation as soon as the component renders. Off by default because LLM calls cost money.

property.name: promptTemplateApiName
property.label: Prompt Template API Name
property.description: DeveloperName of the Prompt Template that contains the scoring rubric.

property.name: agentApiName
property.label: Agent (BotDefinition) API Name
property.description: DeveloperName of the Agentforce agent being evaluated.

property.name: evaluatorFlowApiName
property.label: Evaluator Flow API Name
property.description: Autolaunched Flow that invokes the Prompt Template and returns a JSON scorecard.
